case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. SANTO ANDRES EUCEDA MATA

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO DEC-19-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-02-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATA, SANTO ANDRES EUCEDA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,675.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF PROVED ITS CASE.
